Just released thread-utils-context-0.4.1.0 to Hackage. It's used under the hood by my hs-opentelemetry suite, and managed to get some significant speedups. A full read-write cycle over values in thread-local-storage have been sped up from ~248 ns to ~13 ns on my machine. 19x faster!

60% of Kubernetes misconfigurations happen during manual YAML wiring. I spent years debugging indentation errors that crashed production. We built KubeOrch to replace those brittle text files with a visual drag-and-drop canvas. Seeing your cluster architecture is safer than reading it.

kubeorch.dev
